race.comment: BLUE POLES (11) was fair on debut then relished the extra ground at her second outing with a second over 1400m at Bathurst. Has further upside and will be tough to stop again. UNDER ARREST (9) was prominent from the outset and fought on for second last start over 1690m at this track, making it two minor placings in a row. Should be handy in the run. Building to a win. ABLESHEEBA (4) fought on for third last start over 1690m at this track, making it two minor placings in a row. Found the line nicely here last time and can go close again. GRATIFICATION (1) finished just ahead of ABLESHEEBA last time in the same race. Has placed three of last four and rates a strong chance. KALAMIA KING (2) rates highly on best form and gets his chance to feature.
